name: delcam/firm-values
title: DelCam: Firm Values
description: Section displaying core firm values. Values managed directly in the block.

default.title: Integrity
default.content: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of transparency and honesty in every interaction with founders, investors, and partners.

default.title: Conviction
default.content: We take concentrated positions in businesses we deeply understand, backing our thesis with patience and resolve through market cycles.

default.title: Partnership
default.content: We operate as true partners to management teams — providing capital, operational expertise, and our network to accelerate growth.

default.title: Excellence
default.content: We pursue superior outcomes by combining rigorous analysis, creative problem-solving, and disciplined execution at every stage.
